label: P-1
stance: Graduate seal-grade to typed deliberation_counterfactuals with FK to deliberations and T-36 admit dispatched in-band on deliberation-seal; subtract the §4 prose-prefix clause byte-for-byte.
body_md:
**Position.** Graduate seal-grade to typed `deliberation_counterfactuals` FK deliberations, disposition enum, T-36 in-band on `deliberation-seal`; delete §4 prose-prefix byte-for-byte.

**Schema sketch.**
- Migration 040 creates `deliberation_counterfactuals` PK `counterfactual_id` AUTOINCREMENT FK `deliberation_id` ON DELETE CASCADE plus denormalised `session_id` for query speed.
- Column `seq` INTEGER NOT NULL with UNIQUE(deliberation_id, seq) starting at 1; one row per counterfactual ordered as authored.
- Column `position_atom_id` NOT NULL FK atoms on new atom_kind `counterfactual_position` (8..240 chars); column `why_atom_id` NOT NULL on atom_kind `counterfactual_why`.
- Column `disposition` TEXT NOT NULL CHECK IN ('addressed-in-synthesis','deferred-to-FR','nilled-by-exclusion'); column `disposition_cite_object_id` NULL FK objects for synthesis-point/FR/exclusion anchor.
- Column `disposition_note_atom_id` NULL on atom_kind `counterfactual_disposition_note`; column `exclusion_kind` TEXT NULL CHECK IN ('preserved-as-divergence','barred-by-constraint','micro-decision','out-of-scope').
- CHECK enforces exclusion_kind NOT NULL when disposition='nilled-by-exclusion'; CHECK enforces disposition_cite_object_id NOT NULL when disposition IN ('addressed-in-synthesis','deferred-to-FR').
- Column `nil_attestation` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK IN (0,1); seq=1 + nil_attestation=1 encodes seal-grade:0 with mandatory exclusion_kind populated.
- Column `created_at` TEXT default CURRENT timestamp; index `idx_dc_deliberation` on (deliberation_id, seq); atom_kinds registered via 039-style cliff-named widening companion.

**CLI surface.**
- New submit kind `bin/selvedge submit deliberation-counterfactual --payload '{deliberation_id, position, why, disposition, disposition_cite, disposition_note, exclusion_kind, nil_attestation}'`.
- Handler `_submit_deliberation_counterfactual` writes one row per call auto-incrementing seq within deliberation_id; refuses when parent deliberation already sealed (E_ALREADY_SEALED guard).
- Counterfactuals must land before `deliberation-seal` in same session mirroring perspective + synthesis_point ordering, giving T-36 a row-set to assert against at seal time.
- New read CLI `bin/selvedge counterfactuals --deliberation <id|alias> --print` renders seal-grade inventory as markdown; no disk write per DV-S176-1 P-2 read-write separation.
- New query preset `bin/selvedge query --preset seal-grade-coverage` enumerates sealed deliberations with zero counterfactual rows for back-pressure visibility post-engine-v50.
- Optional shorthand `seal_grade_zero_exclusion: <enum>` on `deliberation-seal` payload converted by handler into one nil_attestation=1 row authored atomically inside seal write_tx.

**Migration path.**
- Migration 040 creates table + atom_kind_specs + role_write_capabilities INSERT + indices + bumps engine-v49 to engine-v50 in single forward-only transaction per DV-S176-1 C-4.
- Handler edit in selvedge/submit/deliberation.py: `_submit_deliberation_seal` adds T-36 admit-predicate after sealed_at UPDATE inside same write_tx; refuses E_REFUSAL_T36 with refusal text naming shortcut path.
- T-36 admit predicate: `count(deliberation_counterfactuals WHERE deliberation_id=?) >= 1`; nil_attestation=1 satisfies; row-presence not row-quality matches T-32 receipt-presence shape.
- Tests added to state/tests/test_path_a_kinds.py: seal_refuses_without_counterfactual + seal_admits_zero_with_nil + counterfactual_refuses_after_seal + disposition_enum + nil_requires_exclusion + deferred_requires_fr_cite.
- Spec deletes in same session: prompts/development.md §4 lines 94-126 DELETED replaced by 6-line pointer naming submit deliberation-counterfactual + T-36 + migration 040.
- specifications/methodology.md §Synthesis line 101 pointer rewritten to cite typed surface not engine_feedback prefix; bumps methodology v11 to v12 + prompt-development v22 to v23.
- Backfill migration 040b OPTIONAL replays 7 historical seal-grade EF rows into typed table; rejected at v1 as out-of-scope since legacy alias-queryable; cited in DV-S180-N effects.

**What not.**
- Do NOT extend synthesis_points.kind enum with counterfactual value; counterfactuals are meta-on-the-synthesis not synthesis-points-of-the-deliberation; typed-table separation matches actor-distinction P-3 D-23 named.
- Do NOT keep engine_feedback seal-grade prefix as fallback path; net coherence-gain requires prose surface DELETED not coexist; coexistence reproduces §3 speaker-authority confusion the graduation resolves.
- Do NOT defer spec deletion to follow-up session; subtraction lands in same write_tx as substrate addition or design fails constraint-without-compromise discharge per S180-open mandate.
- Do NOT add quality-predicate to T-36 (word-length, semantic-similarity); gate enforces row-presence + disposition-enum-validity not synthesizer-judgement-quality matching T-32 row-presence-not-content discipline.
- Do NOT scope-limit to methodology-changing deliberations; universal scope per C-4 D-23 + nil_attestation cheap-exit handles tactical seals analogous to audit-step:0.
- Do NOT couple this graduation to §8.5 audit-step graduation; actor (synthesizer vs session-closer) and timing (seal vs close) are mechanically distinct mirroring D-23 split logic.

**Open questions.**
- Should disposition='deferred-to-FR' require the FR row exist BEFORE counterfactual submit or admit forward-creation in same session; FR pattern admits both so matching is cheaper.
- Does exclusion_kind enum need a fifth value frame-exhausted distinct from out-of-scope, or is four-value sufficient — defer to first calibration-EF naming an unfit exclusion.
- Does `query --preset seal-grade-coverage` belong in v1 migration or follow-up session; preset-addition is mechanism-addition that may not pay before query patterns stabilise.
- Should T-36 refusal text recommend seal_grade_zero_exclusion shortcut OR direct operator to long-form submit; recommendation-shaping is prose-discipline needing calibration-EF evidence.
- Is the optional seal_grade_zero_exclusion shortcut on deliberation-seal a CLI surface that violates DV-S176-1 P-2 read-write separation by mixing seal with author-counterfactual.

**Risks.**
- False-positive shape: tactical seal where synthesizer sees no counterfactual and forgets nil_attestation triggers E_REFUSAL_T36 mid-session; refusal-debt bounded to one extra submit.
- Recovery path: `submit deliberation-counterfactual {nil_attestation:1, exclusion_kind:'out-of-scope', position:'frame exhausted', disposition:'nilled-by-exclusion'}` then re-seal; named in refusal text.
- M-1 inversion risk: T-36 fires + forces row-presence but synthesizer authors low-quality rows to satisfy it (substrate-gate variant of M-1 prediction); mitigated by row-presence-not-content + calibration-EF watch on nil rate.
- Migration 040 atom_kind widening at 240-char ceiling reproduces OI-S177-1 atom-length cliff if counterfactual-why bodies need cross-clause reasoning; mitigated by 039-style cliff-named widening on recurrence.
- Backfill-rejected risk: 7 historical EF seal-grade rows remain queryable only via engine_feedback substring; mitigated by leaving in place + citing in DV-S180-N effects so audit walks find them.
- Handler-only T-36 admits direct-INSERT bypass; mitigated by FR-S180-N watch matching T-28 graduation pattern (handler+trigger ship together only after synchronously-CHECK-expressible slot exists).
- Deliberation-seal handler edit risks regressing existing seal callers; mitigated by paired test cases + bootstrap verification (D-29 itself is first seal under T-36 with rows authored against deliberation_id=29).

**What lost.**
- Lose DV-S109-1 ceremony-subtraction discipline-as-default; net mechanism-addition; defended by S180-open operator-named-mandate citing constraints-without-compromise as §1.5 admissibility per D-27 S176 precedent.
- Lose symmetry between §4 seal-grade and §8.5 audit-step prefix-row patterns; future readers see seal-grade typed and audit-step prefix until §8.5 graduates; preserved as FR-S180-N parity-tracking.
- Lose cheap-experimentation property of prefix-rows (zero-migration structured-headlines); future structured disciplines must justify typed graduation upfront or accept eventual cost; matches DV-S152-1 stage-gate inverted by mandate.
- Lose option to revisit M-1 ship-nothing path; once typed table ships reverting requires DROP TABLE violating T-15 additive-only without T-15-CALIBRATED carve-out; recovery is deprecate submit kind not drop table.
- Lose engine-v49-to-v50 stability window; methodology kernel revision load-bearing per DV-S159-1 precedent so bump required and orientation packets need re-cache.
